task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'Scanned-Invoice' document and view the invoice image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the Nuxeo web interface with the 'Scanned-Invoice' document open, displaying the invoice image preview.

task_completion.description: Open the metadata edit form for the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the metadata edit form or edit tab active for the 'Scanned-Invoice' document.

task_completion.description: Update the 'Title' field with the Invoice Number.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the 'Title' input field containing the Invoice Number (format: INV-XXXX) that matches the number visible in the invoice image.

task_completion.description: Update the 'Source' field with the Vendor Name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the 'Source' input field containing the Vendor Name that matches the vendor visible in the invoice image.

task_completion.description: Update the 'Description' field with the Total Amount.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the 'Description' input field containing the Total Amount that matches the amount visible in the invoice image.

task_completion.description: Save the metadata changes to the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the document view page with the updated metadata (Title, Source, Description) successfully saved, or a success message indicating the document was modified.

integrity.description: The agent used the Nuxeo web interface to edit the metadata.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the browser is used to navigate Nuxeo and edit the document, rather than terminal windows executing curl, python, or psql commands.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual data from the invoice image.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the values entered in the metadata fields exactly match the text visible in the invoice image preview, rather than generic placeholders or guessed values.

integrity.description: The agent did not access the ground truth JSON file to get the answers.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent does not open or read the `/var/lib/nuxeo/invoice_ground_truth.json` file in a terminal or text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task operates within Nuxeo Platform 10.10. The invoice image contains randomly generated data: Invoice numbers are formatted as INV-XXXX (e.g., INV-1234), vendors are one of [Acme Corp, Globex Inc, Soylent Corp, Umbrella Corp, Cyberdyne Systems], and amounts are random dollar values. The agent must extract this information from the image preview and update the document metadata: 'Title' (dc:title) = Invoice Number, 'Source' (dc:source) = Vendor Name, and 'Description' (dc:description) = Total Amount. The document is named 'Scanned-Invoice' and is located in the 'Projects' workspace.
